direction_head.model: StandardScaler plus multinomial logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
direction_head.representation: mean and population SD over g=2..16 for each of 27 non-depth coordinates; identical to the external-panel depth grid
direction_head.score_interpretation: uncalibrated out-of-distribution score; not a probability or posterior
direction_head.training_selection: all positive canonical replicates at every migration rate

gate_head.model: StandardScaler plus binary logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
gate_head.representation: selected depth rows plus across-depth mean of 27 non-depth coordinates
gate_head.score_interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not the canonical 243-D gate probability
gate_head.training_target: positive migration with rate >=2.5e-4 versus weak positives plus control

guardrail: independent biophysical direction stress test only; passive-larval ROMS transport is not introgression truth, comparisons are correlated and multi-edge, no panel is accuracy-eligible, and severe-OOD outputs abstain

outcome_summary.interpretation: two correlated oceanographic comparisons from one system, each repeated under two locus-ascertainment filters; run counts are not accuracy trials

adjudication.severe_OOD_rule: max(direction RMS-z, gate RMS-z) > 10; heuristic, not calibrated support

external_expectation.direction_basis: an independently simulated ROMS passive-larval edge exceeds its reciprocal in all four seasons under the published source-release representation; the destination-conditional semantic sensitivity agrees in every season where both destination totals are nonzero and records undefined seasons as null

external_edge_evidence.normalization_guardrail: mean settler counts divided by 100 reproduce current-paper Figure 3 and the labelled thesis scale, while the prose definition implies destination-conditional normalization. Conditional comparisons use only seasons where both destination denominators are positive; undefined shares remain null. Neither representation is a genomic migration rate

external_expectation.label_source_reuse: the particle matrices are numerically independent of the SNPs, but geography, site choice, and biological interpretation are shared with the source study
external_expectation.locus_filter_variant: both alleles called across the complete three-population panel
external_expectation.multi_edge_guardrail: the oceanographic system contains many simultaneous edges and is outside the single-pulse training histories
external_expectation.temporal_guardrail: ROMS seasons span 2008-2012 and represent potential 100-day passive larval transport, whereas adults were sampled across years and SNPs integrate deeper history
external_expectation.tree_contract_status: operational ((P1,P2),P3) order places central-WAP DOI/FHA or southern AIS/HOS as the closer geographic/genetic pair; it is not a rooted species-tree contract

filter_contract.cap_method: fixed-seed reservoir over eligible loci, restored to source order
filter_contract.filter: PASS or dot (sources are author-filtered releases)
filter_contract.polymorphism: both REF and ALT must be called across every declared three-population panel
filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

iid_locus_bootstrap.guardrail: fixed-sample conditional sensitivity only; all source CHROM values are 0 and no linkage map exists, so independence is unverified and this is not chromosome-block uncertainty
iid_locus_bootstrap.method: naive IID resampling of released GBS loci

model_free_comparator.interpretation: sample-frequency geometry only; projection is reference-flip invariant but is not bounded ancestry or temporal direction. The finite-copy f3 correction assumes independent binomial called-copy sampling and is not generally unbiased. The prespecified 0.95 diagnostic threshold is retained even when it yields zero loci and is not tuned post hoc.

population_order.tree_contract_status: operational ((P1,P2),P3) order places central-WAP DOI/FHA or southern AIS/HOS as the closer geographic/genetic pair; it is not a rooted species-tree contract

simulation_feature_shift.reference: StandardScaler fitted to 2,700 positive regen_full summaries on the identical g=2..16 grid

simulation_gate.interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not a probability or posterior

simulation_head.interpretation: uncalibrated OOD scores; not probabilities or posteriors

candidate_directions: DOI -> FHA exceeds reciprocal FHA -> DOI in each of four ROMS seasons.
AIS -> HOS exceeds reciprocal HOS -> AIS in each of four ROMS seasons.
published_evidence.freshness_audit: as of 2026-07-11, this remains the latest peer-reviewed species-specific population-genomic plus biophysical connectivity study; no correction, retraction, or independent directional reanalysis was found. A 2026 assembly preprint is newer species genomics but does not reanalyse these populations or connectivity labels; a later cross-taxon WAP paper describes the cited structure as subtle/high-gene-flow context without validating a pairwise direction
published_evidence.independence_guardrail: ROMS particle paths are numerically independent of the SNP genotypes, but are potential physical dispersal rather than realized migration or introgression
published_evidence.normalization_adjudication: current-paper and thesis figure cells reproduce mean day-100 D per 100 released particles; the prose instead describes destination-conditional C, so both are audited
published_evidence.source_conclusion: the paper reports four regional genetic groups and concludes that geography plus ocean circulation explains structure better than either alone

runtime.process_priority: BelowNormal requested at runner start on Windows

source.ascertainment_guardrails: ApeKI GBS/UNEAK release; author filters include site call rate 0.75, minimum proportion of sites present 0.7, MAF 0.01, population-label-informed modified HWE/FDR filtering, and removal of pcadapt/BayeScan differentiated candidates; this may attenuate private/differentiated signal, and all loci have artificial CHROM=0

biophysical_archive_audit.aggregation: take the chronologically last (day-100) matrix for each release run, average 10 run D matrices within each season, then average four seasonal summaries
biophysical_archive_audit.axis_mapping_status: reconstructed from the thesis's labelled old-ten axes plus exact current-paper Figure 3 cell/archive cross-checks; DOI/FHA use labelled old-ten positions, while secondary AIS/HOS additionally depends on the verified appended HOS crosswalk

ais_to_hos_doi.normalization_guardrail: mean settler counts divided by 100 reproduce current-paper Figure 3 and the labelled thesis scale, while the prose definition implies destination-conditional normalization. Conditional comparisons use only seasons where both destination denominators are positive; undefined shares remain null. Neither representation is a genomic migration rate

doi_to_fha_hos.normalization_guardrail: mean settler counts divided by 100 reproduce current-paper Figure 3 and the labelled thesis scale, while the prose definition implies destination-conditional normalization. Conditional comparisons use only seasons where both destination denominators are positive; undefined shares remain null. Neither representation is a genomic migration rate

biophysical_archive_audit.raw_row_orientation: stored rows are reverse plotted-destination order and are flipped before indexing; columns are origin in labelled x-axis order

source_implementation_discrepancy.benchmark_policy: report raw settlement rate, per-season and pooled destination shares separately; the source-release candidate direction must hold in all four seasons, while the destination-conditional sensitivity is compared only where both denominators exist
source_implementation_discrepancy.figure_numeric_scale: every inspected current-paper Figure 3 cell exactly equals its seasonal mean D; with 100 particles released per source/run, this is percentage points of source releases and matches the explicitly percent-labelled thesis precursor
source_implementation_discrepancy.methods_semantics: C is described as the share of particles settling at destination j that originated at i

ais_to_hos_doi.selection: all released VCF columns from the three named prefix-defined sites

doi_to_fha_hos.selection: all released VCF columns from the three named prefix-defined sites

mapping_audit.guardrail: prefix membership is reconstructed from the released VCF/README and independent same-project GBIF records; it is not an author-supplied VCF population map
known_discrepancies: VCF HGR_01/HGR_02 correspond to Green Reef although the README says HGE.
README HAR=Alexander conflicts with the paper/model AIS=Adelaide; matching GBIF project occurrences place HAR samples in the Adelaide/Rothera region.
The VCF includes 10 HAC Fildes Bay samples omitted from the paper Table 1 total of 133.

source_vcf_contract.allele_orientation_guardrail: the Tassel header states that the reference allele is unknown and the major allele was encoded as REF; REF must not be interpreted as ancestral
source_vcf_contract.linkage_guardrail: all released loci use CHROM=0 and no reference linkage map is supplied; physical independence cannot be verified

freshness_audit.guardrail: Latest connectivity study does not mean latest species genomic resource, and no later work supplies gold directional truth.
freshness_audit.later_cross_taxon_context: Bruning et al. 2026 Scientific Reports, DOI 10.1038/s41598-026-47577-5, characterizes the cited H. antarcticus structure as subtle with generally high gene flow but does not reanalyse these data.
freshness_audit.newer_species_genomics_not_connectivity: Martelossi et al. 2026 bioRxiv phased assembly preprint, DOI 10.64898/2026.04.21.719633

known_discrepancies: The README says HGE for Green Reef, while the released VCF uses HGR.
The README says HAR is Alexander Island; matching occurrences from the same author project place HAR identifiers in the Adelaide Island/Rothera region represented as AIS in the paper and ROMS model.
The 143-column VCF contains 10 HAC Fildes Bay samples omitted from the 133-sample paper Table 1 totals.

The archived matrices do not embed site labels. Their old-ten-plus-GRE/HOS order and the current paper figure's different display permutation are reconstructed by exact cell-value cross-checks against labelled thesis and current-paper figures.

normalization_guardrail.detail: Every inspected current-paper Figure 3 cell exactly equals the seasonal ten-run mean day-100 D count. Because 100 particles were released from each origin per run, cells are percentage points of source releases. The methods prose instead reads like an origin share conditional on destination. The benchmark treats D/100 as the published implementation and reports destination-conditional shares only as a semantic sensitivity; neither is genomic migration truth.
